seed_instruction: Send an email to a public park office asking about picnic reservations.
org_constraint: The email should contain exactly 150 words, with each sentence containing no more than 20 words.
new_constraint: The email must contain at least 10 sentences.
instruction: Send an email to a public park office asking about picnic reservations. The email should contain exactly 150 words, with each sentence containing no more than 20 words. The email must contain at least 10 sentences.
response:
Subject: Picnic Reservation Inquiry - [Your Name]

Dear Park Office Staff,

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to ask about picnic reservations. I plan to visit [Name of Park] soon. My group will be around [Number] people. We are hoping to have a picnic on [Date of desired date]. Could you please tell me about your booking process? Are reservations required for picnic areas? If so, what is your availability? Please let me know the reservation fees. I also want to know about any capacity limits. Thank you very much for your time. I look forward to your reply.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]<turn|>
